title: rubus cinerascens
intro: Rubus cinerascens, also known as the smoky raspberry or smoky bramble, is a species of raspberry native to eastern Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus cinerascens include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rubus cinerascens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a fresh fruit or used in jams and preserves.
